name: Cannoli
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Grated Orange or Lemon Rind
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------FOR FILLING--------------------------------
1.00 lb Ricotta Cheese
2.00 tbsp Miniature Chocolate Bits, or
Shaved Semi-Sweet Chocolate
1.00 tbsp Candied Citron, or Glazed Fruit
2.00 tbsp Sugar
PASTA: Combine flour, salt, sugar, citrus rind and butter in a bowl and mix well. Gradually add Marsala wine by the teaspoon until the dough is stiff. Chill for 2 hours.
Roll the dough on a lightly-floured board into a large rectangle. Cut into 4-inch squares. Wrap each square around cannoli tubes so that 2 corners fold over and two corners point outward. Brush the touching corners with egg white to ensure they stick together. Deep fry in hot oil until golden brown. Remove from the oil, cool, and fill. Makes 10 to 12 cannolis. If you don't have cannoli tubes, make 2-inch diameter tubes out of heavy-duty aluminum foil and fold the dough accordingly.
FILLING: Combine all ingredients and fill the cannolis.
